base_url.description: Wikimedia REST API base URL override for tests or proxies.

access.description: Access method filter for the pageviews endpoint, e.g. all-access, desktop, mobile-app, mobile-web.

agent.description: Agent type filter for the pageviews endpoint, e.g. all-agents, user, spider, automated.

article.description: Article title (as it appears in the Wikimedia URL, e.g. Ada_Lovelace) for the per-article pageviews stream.

start.description: Start date/time for the pageviews stream's requested range, YYYYMMDD or YYYYMMDDHH.

end.description: End date/time for the pageviews stream's requested range, YYYYMMDD or YYYYMMDDHH.

country.description: ISO country code for the top_articles stream, e.g. US. Required only when reading the top_articles stream.

year.description: 4-digit year for the top_articles stream, e.g. 2026. Required only when reading the top_articles stream (see Known limits: legacy's start[:8]-truncation derivation is not modeled).

month.description: 2-digit month for the top_articles stream, e.g. 01. Required only when reading the top_articles stream.

day.description: 2-digit day for the top_articles stream, e.g. 01. Required only when reading the top_articles stream.
